messages.text: Team update: I've approved a custom pricing arrangement for GlobalTech Solutions. They're going live on Enterprise tier at **$18/seat/month** for their 200-seat deployment. This was discussed and signed off verbally in the leadership call this morning.
Got it. That's a 25% discount off the standard $24 rate. Should I note anything special in Salesforce?
Yes, note it as a strategic account deal. Don't put the discount percentage in — just log the final rate as $18/seat. We'll formalize it in the contract addendum next week.
Noted. Should I create a support ticket for this so billing is aware?
No ticket needed for now — let's keep this informal until the amendment is signed. I'll loop in Tom Bradley directly. Just make sure the invoice when it goes out reflects $18/seat.
Understood. I'll also confirm the payment terms — standard Net 30?
Standard Net 30 for now. They asked for Net 60 but I didn't commit to that — the pricing was already a big give.
